word: H4529 - מָסָה - mâçâh - maw-saw' - Make to consume away

sections.paragraph:
Original: מסה

Transliteration: mâsâh

Phonetic: maw-saw'

BDB Definition:

  1. to melt, dissolve, be liquefied
    1. (Hiphil)
      1. to melt, cause to dissolve, consume, cause to vanish
      2. to intimidate (figuratively)

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1219

Part(s) of speech: Verb
